creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
For an example of a simple, port-friendly Makefile:

https://github.com/auerlab/vcf-split

The ports system (and pkgsrc) automatically provide all the information needed by this project Makefile (CC, CFLAGS, etc).  The only thing we might need to do from the port is run "make depend", if you use that feature in your Makefile.  Otherwise, the port Makefile will be trivial.

https://github.com/outpaddling/freebsd-ports-wip/blob/master/vcf-split
